title: character mode
text: character mode A user interface in which proportional font spacing and pixel-based screen painting are not possible. Related Links character cell A unit of measurement for defining the size and location of forms and fields. It is equivalent to the space occupied by one character on the screen in a character mode application. widget An element in a user interface that represents an entity, field, or operation call. It determines the appearance and behavior of the field, and the way the user enters or selects values in the field. unifield The standard Uniface field type, capable of handling all data types and operating identically in Windows and character mode. Unifields do not support proportional font spacing. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
